# DOW-UAP-D64, Mission Report, Iran, November 2020 - Page 1

Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Declassified on: 16 March 2026
FOUO / Privacy Act applies

# Misrep 5039166

## Narrative
AT 0608Z [1.4a] TOOK OFF FROM OKAS. AT 0618Z, [1.4a] HANDED OVER FROM THE LRE. FROM 0939Z TO 0153Z [1.4a] FROM 1015Z TO 0112Z [1.4a] SUPPORTED NAVCENT FOR OPERATION [redacted] [1.4a] IVO ARABIAN GULF, STRAIT OF HORMUZ AND GULF OF OMAN. SEE ISR LINE 1. AT 1012Z [1.4a] RECEIVED A GUARDCALL. SEE GUARDCALL LINE 1. AT 2143Z, [1.4a] OBSERVED A UAP. SEE OBS LINE 2. AT 0112Z [1.4a] WAS CLEARED TO RTB. AT 021 [1.4a] HANDED BACK TO THE LRE. AT 0250Z, [1.4a] LANDED AT OKAS. FMV WAS EXPLOITED BY DGS1. 20.42 MISSION HOURS, 18.55 IMINT HOURS, 1 IMINT TASKING PROSECUTED, 16.2 [1.4a] HOURS, 1 [1.4a] TASKING PROSECUTED, 2 TOTAL TASKINGS PROSECUTED

# DOW-UAP-D64, Mission Report, Iran, November 2020 - Page 5

Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Declassified on: 16 March 2026
FOUO / Privacy Act applies

[redacted]

* Sensors Available: AH\GMESH
* Tasking Type: PLANNED
* Tasking or Request Number (JTAR#, AEM#, PRI#, or TIC#): -
* BE Number (if NTISR): -
* Tasked Start Point: 39RUP[redacted]
* Activity Description: ISR
* FMV or Image File Name (if NTISR): -

GENTEXT/ISR
[redacted]

* Gentext: 1.4a COORDINATED WITH NAVCENT 24 HOURS PRIOR TO TAKE OFF. PRECOORD WAS SATISFACTORY. AT 1015Z, 1.4a ARRIVED ON STATION ISO NAVCENT FOR OPERATION [redacted] TO CHARACTERIZE IRIN\IRGCN VESSELS, UAS ACTIVITY, ACTIVITY OUTSIDE OF PORTS, AND TO ESTABLISH PATTERN OF LIFE. AT 1012Z, 1.4a RECEIVED A GUARDCALL. SEE GUARDCALL LINE 1. FROM 1015Z TO 1910Z, 1.4a CONDUCTED SCANS IAW THE TARGET DECK IN THE ARABIAN GULF (AG). AT 2143Z, 1.4a OBSERVED A UAP. SEE OBS LINE 1. AT 2148Z, 1.4a OBSERVED A SECOND UAP. SEE OBS LINE 2. FROM 1910Z TO 2210Z, 1.4a CONDUCTED OPEN WATER SCANS ISO UUV, NO IDENTIFICATION OF UUV WAS FOUND. FROM 2210Z TO 0113Z, 1.4a CONDUCTED SCANS IAW THE TARGET DECK IN THE ARABIAN GULF (AG). AT 0112Z, 1.4a WAS CLEARED OFF TASKING AND RETURNED TO BASE (RTB)

ISR ASSET UTILIZATION
* Snpported Unit: NAVCENT
* Supported Operation: OPERATION [redacted]
* Precoord Time: 24 HOURS
* Precoord Effectiveness: SATISFACTORY

WEATHER
* Weather: (U) HAZE PRECLUDED IMINT COLLECTION

EFFECTIVENESS
* Tasker:
* Intel Gap Filled?: No
* Gentext: -

Off Station
* Time Off Station DTG: 030113:00ZNOV20
* Total Time On Station: 18 hours 55 minutes

[redacted]
